name: aurora-ai-attachments
title: Aurora AI Attachments
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora-native attachments parity surface from AI Elements.

files.content:
"use client"

export { AttachmentChip as Attachments } from "@/registry/aurora/blocks/files/attachment/attachment"

docs:
Aurora block that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ai/attachments.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`, `aurora-attachment`.
